title: T-055 — E2E operations closeout: shift sign-off, OEE, downtime and DLQ replay
prompt:
# T-055 — E2E operations closeout: shift sign-off, OEE, downtime and DLQ replay

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-05..08, SCR-08-11, PROD-012

Goal: Create Playwright coverage and artifact evidence for E2E operations closeout: shift sign-off, OEE, downtime and DLQ replay.

Implementation details:
Exercise downtime logging, OEE snapshot display, line event stream, shift end unresolved-gate blocker, and DLQ replay/resolve admin flow. Tests must capture screenshots and retain trace.zip/video artifacts under test-results or configured Playwright output. Use deterministic seed fixtures and clean up org-scoped data after each run.

Scope files:
- apps/web/e2e/production.spec.ts [create/modify]
- apps/web/e2e/fixtures/production.ts [create/modify]
- apps/web/playwright.config.ts [modify if artifact retention missing]

Acceptance criteria:
1. Playwright test covers the named flow with deterministic seeded data
2. Assertions verify UI state, server-side data changes, and typed blocker/audit evidence
3. Closeout includes screenshot paths and Playwright trace artifact paths

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
